prompts.generated_code:
#!/usr/bin/env ruby
# frozen_string_literal: true

=begin
Jiosell Product Availability Comparator
---------------------------------------
This script fetches and compares product availability for "Home" and "Kitchen" items
from online stores listed in a configuration file (YAML).

It scrapes the configured category URLs for each store, extracts product data using the
provided CSS selectors, and consolidates availability across stores for comparison.

Usage:
  ruby jiosell_availability.rb --config stores.yml --output results.json

Arguments:
  --config, -c   Path to YAML config file describing Jiosell's stores and selectors
  --output, -o   Path to output JSON file (optional; default: prints to STDOUT)
  --concurrency  Number of stores to scrape in parallel (default: 4)
  --timeout      HTTP request timeout in seconds (default: 15)
  --max-pages    Max pages to paginate per category (default: 5)
  --delay-ms     Delay between requests per store in milliseconds (default: 300)
  --user-agent   Custom User-Agent string (default set below)
  --verbose, -v  Enable verbose logging
  --help, -h     Show help

Config file (YAML) example (stores.yml):
---------------------------------------
stores:
  - name: Demo Store A
    base_url: "https://www.demostorea.example"
    categories:
      home: "https://www.demostorea.example/category/home"
      kitchen: "https://www.demostorea.example/category/kitchen"
    selectors:
      product: ".product-card"
      title: ".product-title"
      url: ".product-title a"
      url_attr: "href"
      price: ".product-price"
      availability: ".availability"
      in_stock_match: "in stock"
      out_of_stock_match: "out of stock"
      # Optional pagination link selector for "next" page
      next_page: "a.pagination-next"
  - name: Demo Store B
    base_url: "https://shop.demo-b.example"
    categories:
      home: "https://shop.demo-b.example/home"
      kitchen: "https://shop.demo-b.example/kitchen"
    selectors:
      product: "div.item"
      title: "h2"
      url: "a.details"
      url_attr: "href"
      price: "span.price"
      availability: "span.badge"
      in_stock_match: "available"
      out_of_stock_match: "sold out"
      next_page: "link[rel='next']"

Notes:
- The script respects simple CSS selector extraction. If a field/selector is missing,
  the value may be nil and the script will continue.
- Availability is determined via substring matching (case-insensitive) against the
  "availability" element text. If no match is found, status is "unknown".
- For URLs extracted via a relative path, the script will expand to absolute URLs
  using base_url when possible.
- Always verify you are permitted to scrape the target websites as per their terms,
  and consider implementing robots.txt checks if necessary.

Dependencies are installed on-the-fly via bundler/inline.
=end

require 'bundler/inline'

gemfile(true) do
  source 'https://rubygems.org'
  gem 'faraday', '~> 2.9'
  gem 'faraday-follow_redirects', '~> 0.3'
  gem 'nokogiri', '>= 1.15'
end

require 'json'
require 'yaml'
require 'optparse'
require 'uri'
require 'time'

# Namespace
module Jiosell
  # Simple logger with verbosity control
  class Logger
    def initialize(verbose: false)
      @verbose = verbose
    end

    def info(msg)
      puts "[INFO] #{msg}"
    end

    def warn(msg)
      $stderr.puts "[WARN] #{msg}"
    end

    def error(msg)
      $stderr.puts "[ERROR] #{msg}"
    end

    def debug(msg)
      return unless @verbose

      $stderr.puts "[DEBUG] #{msg}"
    end
  end

  # Configuration loader and validator
  class Config
    REQUIRED_STORE_KEYS = %w[name categories selectors].freeze

    attr_reader :stores, :http_timeout, :max_pages, :request_delay_ms, :user_agent, :concurrency

    def initialize(path:, http_timeout:, max_pages:, request_delay_ms:, user_agent:, concurrency:)
      @config_path = path
      @http_timeout = http_timeout
      @max_pages = max_pages
      @request_delay_ms = request_delay_ms
      @user_agent = user_agent
      @concurrency = concurrency
      @stores = []
    end

    def load!
      data = YAML.safe_load(File.read(@config_path), permitted_classes: [], aliases: false)
      unless data.is_a?(Hash) && data['stores'].is_a?(Array)
        raise ArgumentError, "Invalid config: root key 'stores' must be an array"
      end

      @stores = data['stores'].map.with_index(1) do |store, idx|
        validate_store!(store, idx)
        normalize_store(store)
      end
      self
    end

    private

    def validate_store!(store, idx)
      missing = REQUIRED_STORE_KEYS - store.keys.map(&:to_s)
      raise ArgumentError, "Store ##{idx} missing keys: #{missing.join(', ')}" unless missing.empty?

      categories = store['categories'] || {}
      unless categories['home'].is_a?(String) && categories['kitchen'].is_a?(String)
        raise ArgumentError, "Store ##{idx} must define categories.home and categories.kitchen URLs"
      end
      selectors = store['selectors'] || {}
      required_selectors = %w[product title availability]
      missing_sel = required_selectors - selectors.keys.map(&:to_s)
      raise ArgumentError, "Store ##{idx} selectors missing: #{missing_sel.join(', ')}" unless missing_sel.empty?
    end

    def normalize_store(store)
      {
        name: store['name'].to_s.strip,
        base_url: (store['base_url'] || '').to_s.strip,
        categories: {
          home: store['categories']['home'].to_s.strip,
          kitchen: store['categories']['kitchen'].to_s.strip
        },
        selectors: {
          product: store['selectors']['product'].to_s.strip,
          title: store['selectors']['title'].to_s.strip,
          url: (store['selectors']['url'] || '').to_s.strip,
          url_attr: (store['selectors']['url_attr'] || 'href').to_s.strip,
          price: (store['selectors']['price'] || '').to_s.strip,
          availability: store['selectors']['availability'].to_s.strip,
          in_stock_match: (store['selectors']['in_stock_match'] || 'in stock').to_s.strip,
          out_of_stock_match: (store['selectors']['out_of_stock_match'] || 'out of stock').to_s.strip,
          next_page: (store['selectors']['next_page'] || '').to_s.strip
        }
      }
    end
  end

  # HTTP client wrapper with timeouts, redirects, retries, and headers
  class HttpClient
    DEFAULT_RETRIES = 3
    RETRY_BACKOFF_BASE = 0.5

    def initialize(timeout:, user_agent:, logger:)
      @logger = logger
      @conn = Faraday.new do |f|
        f.request :retry,
                  max: DEFAULT_RETRIES,
                  interval: RETRY_BACKOFF_BASE,
                  interval_randomness: 0.5,
                  backoff_factor: 2,
                  retry_statuses: [408, 429, 500, 502, 503, 504]
        f.response :follow_redirects
        f.adapter Faraday.default_adapter
      end
      @timeout = timeout
      @user_agent = user_agent
    end

    def get(url)
      response = @conn.get(url) do |req|
        req.options.open_timeout = @timeout
        req.options.timeout = @timeout
        req.headers['User-Agent'] = @user_agent
        req.headers['Accept'] = 'text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8'
        req.headers['Accept-Language'] = 'en-US,en;q=0.9'
      end

      unless response.success?
        raise "HTTP #{response.status} for #{url}"
      end

      response.body
    rescue Faraday::Error => e
      raise "Network error for #{url}: #{e.class}: #{e.message}"
    end
  end

  # Utilities for URL handling, text normalization, and sleeps
  module Util
    module_function

    def absolute_url(href, base_url, fallback_url = nil)
      return nil if href.to_s.strip.empty?

      uri = URI.parse(href) rescue nil
      if uri && uri.absolute?
        href
      else
        base = base_url && !base_url.empty? ? base_url : (fallback_url || '')
        return nil if base.empty?
        begin
          URI.join(base, href).to_s
        rescue URI::Error
          nil
        end
      end
    end

    def normalize_product_key(title)
      return nil if title.nil?

      title.downcase
           .gsub(/[^\p{Alnum}\s]/u, ' ')
           .gsub(/\s+/, ' ')
           .strip
    end

    def sleep_ms(ms)
      sleep(ms.to_f / 1000.0) if ms.to_i.positive?
    end
  end

  # Represents product data extracted from a store page
  Product = Struct.new(
    :title, :url, :price, :availability, :category, :store_name,
    keyword_init: true
  )

  # Scrapes a single store using provided selectors and pagination
  class StoreScraper
    AVAIL_IN_STOCK = 'in_stock'
    AVAIL_OUT_OF_STOCK = 'out_of_stock'
    AVAIL_UNKNOWN = 'unknown'

    def initialize(store:, http:, logger:, max_pages:, delay_ms:)
      @store = store
      @http = http
      @logger = logger
      @max_pages = max_pages
      @delay_ms = delay_ms
    end

    def scrape_all
      results = []
      @store[:categories].each do |category, url|
        @logger.info("Scraping #{@store[:name]} (#{category}) => #{url}")
        results.concat(scrape_category(category.to_s, url))
      end
      results
    end

    private

    def scrape_category(category, start_url)
      products = []
      visited = {}
      current_url = start_url
      pages = 0

      while current_url && pages < @max_pages
        break if visited[current_url]
        pages += 1
        visited[current_url] = true

        @logger.debug("Fetching page #{pages} for #{@store[:name]} (#{category}): #{current_url}")
        html = safe_get(current_url)
        doc = Nokogiri::HTML(html)

        products.concat(extract_products(doc, category, current_url))
        next_link = extract_next_page(doc, current_url)
        current_url = next_link
        Util.sleep_ms(@delay_ms)
      end
      products
    end

    def safe_get(url)
      @http.get(url)
    rescue => e
      @logger.warn("Failed to fetch #{url}: #{e}")
      ''
    end

    def extract_products(doc, category, page_url)
      sel = @store[:selectors]
      nodes = doc.css(sel[:product]) || []
      products = []
      nodes.each do |node|
        title = extract_text(node, sel[:title])
        url = extract_url(node, sel[:url], sel[:url_attr], page_url)
        price = extract_text(node, sel[:price]) if sel[:price] && !sel[:price].empty?
        availability_text = extract_text(node, sel[:availability])
        availability = classify_availability(
          availability_text,
          sel[:in_stock_match],
          sel[:out_of_stock_match]
        )
        products << Product.new(
          title: title,
          url: url,
          price: price,
          availability: availability,
          category: category,
          store_name: @store[:name]
        )
      rescue => e
        @logger.warn("Failed to parse product node on #{@store[:name]}: #{e}")
        next
      end
      products
    end

    def extract_next_page(doc, page_url)
      sel = @store[:selectors]
      return nil if sel[:next_page].nil? || sel[:next_page].empty?

      link = doc.at_css(sel[:next_page])
      href = link&.[]('href') || link&.[]('data-href')
      Util.absolute_url(href, @store[:base_url], page_url)
    rescue => e
      @logger.warn("Failed to extract next page on #{@store[:name]}: #{e}")
      nil
    end

    def extract_text(node, css)
      return nil if css.to_s.empty?

      sub = node.at_css(css)
      return nil unless sub

      sub.text.to_s.strip.gsub(/\s+/, ' ')
    end

    def extract_url(node, css, attr, page_url)
      return nil if css.to_s.empty?

      link = node.at_css(css)
      href = link&.[](attr || 'href')
      Util.absolute_url(href, @store[:base_url], page_url)
    end

    def classify_availability(text, in_stock_match, out_of_stock_match)
      t = text.to_s.downcase
      ins = in_stock_match.to_s.downcase
      oos = out_of_stock_match.to_s.downcase

      if !ins.empty? && t.include?(ins)
        AVAIL_IN_STOCK
      elsif !oos.empty? && t.include?(oos)
        AVAIL_OUT_OF_STOCK
      else
        AVAIL_UNKNOWN
      end
    end
  end

  # Consolidates products across stores and compares availability
  class Comparator
    def initialize(logger:)
      @logger = logger
    end

    # Returns a hash keyed by normalized product key with per-store availability
    def consolidate(products)
      result = {}
      products.each do |p|
        key = Util.normalize_product_key(p.title) || "(untitled)"
        result[key] ||= {
          product_key: key,
          categories: {},
          stores: {}
        }
        result[key][:categories][p.category] ||= {}
        result[key][:stores][p.store_name] ||= []

        # Track category presence
        result[key][:categories][p.category][p.store_name] = true

        # Append per-store entry (some stores/cats may list same product multiple times)
        result[key][:stores][p.store_name] << {
          title: p.title,
          url: p.url,
          price: p.price,
          availability: p.availability,
          category: p.category
        }
      end

      # Summarize an availability "rollup" per store for the consolidated record
      result.each_value do |rec|
        rec[:availability_rollup] = rec[:stores].transform_values do |entries|
          summarize_availability(entries.map { |e| e[:availability] })
        end
      end

      result
    end

    private

    def summarize_availability(statuses)
      # Prioritize: in_stock > unknown > out_of_stock (conservative)
      return 'in_stock' if statuses.include?('in_stock')
      return 'unknown' if statuses.include?('unknown')

      'out_of_stock'
    end
  end

  # Orchestrates scraping and comparison for all stores
  class Runner
    def initialize(config:, logger:)
      @config = config
      @logger = logger
      @http = HttpClient.new(timeout: config.http_timeout, user_agent: config.user_agent, logger: logger)
    end

    def run
      all_products = []

      # Simple concurrency by threads over stores (bounded by @config.concurrency)
      queue = Queue.new
      @config.stores.each { |store| queue << store }

      mutex = Mutex.new
      workers = [@config.concurrency, @config.stores.size].min.times.map do
        Thread.new do
          while (store = safe_queue_pop(queue))
            begin
              scraper = StoreScraper.new(
                store: store,
                http: @http,
                logger: @logger,
                max_pages: @config.max_pages,
                delay_ms: @config.request_delay_ms
              )
              products = scraper.scrape_all
              @logger.info("Scraped #{products.size} products from #{store[:name]}")
              mutex.synchronize { all_products.concat(products) }
            rescue => e
              @logger.error("Failed to scrape #{store[:name]}: #{e}")
            end
          end
        end
      end

      workers.each(&:join)

      comparator = Comparator.new(logger: @logger)
      consolidated = comparator.consolidate(all_products)

      {
        metadata: {
          scraped_at: Time.now.utc.iso8601,
          stores_count: @config.stores.size,
          products_count: all_products.size
        },
        consolidated_products: consolidated
      }
    end

    private

    def safe_queue_pop(queue)
      queue.pop(true)
    rescue ThreadError
      nil
    end
  end
end

# CLI handling
options = {
  config: nil,
  output: nil,
  concurrency: 4,
  timeout: 15,
  max_pages: 5,
  delay_ms: 300,
  user_agent: "Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; JiosellAvailabilityBot/1.0; +https://example.com/bot)",
  verbose: false
}

parser = OptionParser.new do |opts|
  opts.banner = "Usage: ruby #{File.basename($PROGRAM_NAME)} --config stores.yml [options]"

  opts.on('-c', '--config PATH', 'Path to YAML config file') { |v| options[:config] = v }
  opts.on('-o', '--output PATH', 'Path to output JSON file') { |v| options[:output] = v }
  opts.on('--concurrency N', Integer, 'Number of parallel store scrapers (default: 4)') { |v| options[:concurrency] = v }
  opts.on('--timeout SEC', Integer, 'HTTP timeout in seconds (default: 15)') { |v| options[:timeout] = v }
  opts.on('--max-pages N', Integer, 'Max pages to paginate per category (default: 5)') { |v| options[:max_pages] = v }
  opts.on('--delay-ms MS', Integer, 'Delay between requests per store in ms (default: 300)') { |v| options[:delay_ms] = v }
  opts.on('--user-agent UA', String, 'Custom User-Agent header') { |v| options[:user_agent] = v }
  opts.on('-v', '--verbose', 'Enable verbose logging') { options[:verbose] = true }
  opts.on('-h', '--help', 'Show help') do
    puts opts
    exit 0
  end
end

begin
  parser.parse!
rescue OptionParser::InvalidOption => e
  $stderr.puts e.message
  $stderr.puts parser
  exit 1
end

if options[:config].nil? || options[:config].empty?
  $stderr.puts "Error: --config is required"
  $stderr.puts parser
  exit 1
end

logger = Jiosell::Logger.new(verbose: options[:verbose])

begin
  config = Jiosell::Config.new(
    path: options[:config],
    http_timeout: options[:timeout],
    max_pages: options[:max_pages],
    request_delay_ms: options[:delay_ms],
    user_agent: options[:user_agent],
    concurrency: options[:concurrency]
  ).load!
rescue Errno::ENOENT
  logger.error("Config file not found: #{options[:config]}")
  exit 1
rescue ArgumentError => e
  logger.error("Invalid config: #{e.message}")
  exit 1
rescue Psych::SyntaxError => e
  logger.error("YAML parsing error: #{e.message}")
  exit 1
end

runner = Jiosell::Runner.new(config: config, logger: logger)
result = runner.run

json = JSON.pretty_generate(result)

if options[:output] && !options[:output].empty?
  begin
    File.write(options[:output], json)
    logger.info("Wrote output to #{options[:output]}")
  rescue => e
    logger.error("Failed to write output: #{e}")
    puts json
    exit 1
  end
else
  puts json
end

exit 0

info:
  title: Loss Group Criteria API

  summary: APIs for integrating Loss Group Criteria services with client systems

    Loss Group Criteria’s services, including policy and claim ingestion, criteria
    management, loss group assignment, risk scoring, batch processing, file ingestion,
    and event/webhook delivery.

  - url: https://sandbox.lossgroupcriteria.example.com

          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [score, assign_loss_group]
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [queued, running, succeeded, failed, cancelled]
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/page_size'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/cursor'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Jobs
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                required: [data, meta]
                properties:
                  data:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: '#/components/schemas/BatchJob'
                  meta:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/PaginationMeta'

  /v1/batch/jobs/{job_id}:
    parameters:
      - $ref: '#/components/parameters/job_id'
    get:
      tags: [Batch]
      summary: Get batch job status
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Job
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/BatchJob'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'

  /v1/batch/jobs/{job_id}/results:
    parameters:
      - $ref: '#/components/parameters/job_id'
    get:
      tags: [Batch]
      summary: Get batch job results
      description: Returns a signed URL to download results (CSV/JSONL).
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Results location
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  download_url:
                    type: string
                    format: uri
                  expires_at:
                    type: string
                    format: date-time
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'

  /v1/webhooks/subscriptions:
    post:
      tags: [Webhooks]
      summary: Create a webhook subscription
      description: |
        Subscribe to events (e.g., criteria.updated, job.succeeded). A verification
        challenge will be performed against the provided callback URL.
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/WebhookSubscription'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Subscription created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/WebhookSubscription'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'
    get:
      tags: [Webhooks]
      summary: List webhook subscriptions
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Subscriptions
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/WebhookSubscription'

  /v1/webhooks/subscriptions/{subscription_id}:
    parameters:
      - $ref: '#/components/parameters/subscription_id'
    delete:
      tags: [Webhooks]
      summary: Delete a subscription
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Deleted
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'

  /v1/events:
    get:
      tags: [Events]
      summary: List events
      description: |
        List recent events with optional replay by cursor. Use for audit or recovery.
      parameters:
        - name: type
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            example: criteria.updated
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/page_size'
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/cursor'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Events
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                required: [data, meta]
                properties:
                  data:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      $ref: '#/components/schemas/Event'
                  meta:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/PaginationMeta'

  /v1/events/{event_id}:
    parameters:
      - $ref: '#/components/parameters/event_id'
    get:
      tags: [Events]
      summary: Get event by ID
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Event
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Event'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'

components:
  securitySchemes:
    OAuth2:
      type: oauth2
      description: OAuth2 Client Credentials
      flows:
        clientCredentials:
          tokenUrl: https://api.lossgroupcriteria.example.com/oauth/token
          scopes:
            read: Read access
            write: Write access
    ApiKey:
      type: apiKey
      in: header
      name: X-API-Key
      description: API key for simple integrations

  headers:
    X-RateLimit-Limit:
      description: Requests allowed in the current window
      schema:
        type: integer
    X-RateLimit-Remaining:
      description: Requests remaining in the current window
      schema:
        type: integer
    X-RateLimit-Reset:
      description: Epoch seconds until rate limit resets
      schema:
        type: integer

  parameters:
    page_size:
      name: page_size
      in: query
      description: Number of items per page (max 200)
      schema:
        type: integer
        minimum: 1
        maximum: 200
        default: 50
    cursor:
      name: cursor
      in: query
      description: Cursor for pagination
      schema:
        type: string
    Idempotency-Key:
      name: Idempotency-Key
      in: header
      description: |
        Unique key to guarantee idempotency for POST requests. Reuse the same key for retries.
      required: false
      schema:
        type: string
        maxLength: 128
    X-Trace-Id:
      name: X-Trace-Id
      in: header
      description: |
        Optional trace identifier for correlating logs across systems.
      required: false
      schema:
        type: string
        maxLength: 128
    client_id:
      name: client_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
        format: uuid
    policy_id:
      name: policy_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
        format: uuid
    claim_id:
      name: claim_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
        format: uuid
    criteria_id:
      name: criteria_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
    file_id:
      name: file_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
        format: uuid
    job_id:
      name: job_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
        format: uuid
    subscription_id:
      name: subscription_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
        format: uuid
    event_id:
      name: event_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
        format: uuid

  responses:
    Unauthorized:
      description: Unauthorized
      headers:
        WWW-Authenticate:
          schema: { type: string }
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'
    NotFound:
      description: Resource not found
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'
    ValidationError:
      description: Validation failed
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'
    TooManyRequests:
      description: Rate limit exceeded
      headers:
        Retry-After:
          schema:
            type: integer
            description: Seconds to wait before retrying
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'

  schemas:
    Health:
      type: object
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [ok, degraded, down]
        uptime_seconds:
          type: integer
        components:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: string
      example:
        status: ok
        uptime_seconds: 123456
        components:
          db: ok
          cache: ok
          queue: ok

    RateLimit:
      type: object
      properties:
        limit:
          type: integer
        burst:
          type: integer
        window_seconds:
          type: integer

    Error:
      type: object
      required: [type, title, status, trace_id]
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          format: uri
          example: https://docs.lossgroupcriteria.example.com/errors/validation
        title:
          type: string
          example: Validation error
        detail:
          type: string
        status:
          type: integer
          example: 400
        code:
          type: string
          example: INVALID_INPUT
        trace_id:
          type: string
          description: Correlate to X-Trace-Id or server logs
        errors:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              field: { type: string }
              message: { type: string }
              code: { type: string }

    PaginationMeta:
      type: object
      required: [page_size]
      properties:
        page_size:
          type: integer
        next_cursor:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    Client:
      type: object
      required: [client_id, name, created_at]
      properties:
        client_id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        name:
          type: string
        callback_url:
          type: string
          format: uri
          nullable: true
        default_criteria_version:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
      example:
        client_id: 1b1e1b2a-29d2-4e8f-8a0e-8c3f0a2c0f36
        name: Acme Insurance
        default_criteria_version: '2025.1'
        callback_url: https://acme.example.com/webhooks/loss-group
        created_at: 2025-01-10T12:34:56Z
        updated_at: 2025-01-10T12:34:56Z

    ClientCreateRequest:
      type: object
      required: [name]
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
        callback_url:
          type: string
          format: uri
          nullable: true
        webhook_secret:
          type: string
          description: |
            If omitted, a secret will be generated. Used to sign webhooks (HMAC-SHA256).
        default_criteria_version:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    Policy:
      type: object
      description: Policy record
      required: [policy_id, policy_number, product_line, status, effective_from, effective_to]
      properties:
        policy_id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        external_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        policy_number:
          type: string
        product_line:
          type: string
          example: auto
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, cancelled, expired, pending]
        effective_from:
          type: string
          format: date
        effective_to:
          type: string
          format: date
        insured:
          type: object
          properties:
            name: { type: string }
            dob: { type: string, format: date }
            address:
              type: object
              properties:
                line1: { type: string }
                city: { type: string }
                state: { type: string }
                postal_code: { type: string }
                country: { type: string }
        attributes:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
          description: Arbitrary attributes for criteria evaluation
      example:
        policy_id: 5b3d5a0b-2c0d-4a9c-9c9b-2c4b8a9e1e1a
        external_id: P-EXT-12345
        policy_number: ACME-AUTO-2025-001
        product_line: auto
        status: active
        effective_from: 2025-01-01
        effective_to: 2025-12-31
        insured:
          name: Jane Doe
          dob: 1990-05-12
          address:
            line1: 123 Main St
            city: Springfield
            state: IL
            postal_code: 62701
            country: US
        attributes:
          vehicle_vin: 1HGCM82633A004352
          garaging_zip: 62701

    ClaimCreateRequest:
      type: object
      required: [policy_id, occurrence_date, loss_type, status]
      properties:
        claim_number:
          type: string
        policy_id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        occurrence_date:
          type: string
          format: date
        loss_type:
          type: string
          example: collision
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [open, closed, pending, denied, paid]
        attributes:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
      example:
        claim_number: CLM-2025-0001
        policy_id: 5b3d5a0b-2c0d-4a9c-9c9b-2c4b8a9e1e1a
        occurrence_date: 2025-02-10
        loss_type: collision
        status: open
        attributes:
          police_report_id: PR-88991
          damage_estimate_usd: 4200

    Claim:
      allOf:
        - $ref: '#/components/schemas/ClaimCreateRequest'
        - type: object
          required: [claim_id, created_at]
          properties:
            claim_id:
              type: string
              format: uuid
            created_at:
              type: string
              format: date-time
            updated_at:
              type: string
              format: date-time

    Criteria:
      type: object
      required: [criteria_id, name, product_line, region, current_version]
      properties:
        criteria_id:
          type: string
        name:
          type: string
          example: Auto Loss Group Criteria
        product_line:
          type: string
          example: auto
        region:
          type: string
          example: US
        description:
          type: string
        current_version:
          type: string
        versions:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string

    LossGroup:
      type: object
      required: [id, name]
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          example: LG-15
        name:
          type: string
          example: Group 15
        description:
          type: string
        attributes:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    ScoreRequest:
      type: object
      required: [subject]
      properties:
        subject:
          type: object
          properties:
            type:
              type: string
              enum: [policy, claim]
            id:
              type: string
            attributes:
              type: object
              additionalProperties: true
        model:
          type: string
          description: Model name or ID
          example: default_v1
        normalize:
          type: boolean
          default: true
        include_factors:
          type: boolean
          default: true

    ScoreResponse:
      type: object
      required: [score]
      properties:
        score:
          type: number
          format: float
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 1
        calibrated_score:
          type: number
          format: float
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 1
          description: Present when normalize=true
        model:
          type: string
        factors:
          type: array
          items:
            type: object
            properties:
              name: { type: string }
              weight: { type: number, format: float }
              direction:
                type: string
                enum: [positive, negative, neutral]
        warnings:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string

    WebhookSubscription:
      type: object
      required: [subscription_id, url, events, active]
      properties:
        subscription_id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        url:
          type: string
          format: uri
        events:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
            example: criteria.updated
        active:
          type: boolean
        secret:
          type: string
          description: Shared secret for signature verification (HMAC-SHA256)
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    Event:
      type: object
      required: [event_id, type, created_at, data]
      properties:
        event_id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        type:
          type: string
          example: job.succeeded
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        data:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
        signature:
          type: string
          description: SHA256 HMAC signature of payload for webhook delivery

    FileUploadInitResponse:
      type: object
      required: [file_id, upload_url, headers]
      properties:
        file_id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        upload_url:
          type: string
          format: uri
        headers:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
          description: Headers to include in the upload request
        expires_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    BatchJob:
      type: object
      required: [job_id, type, status, created_at]
      properties:
        job_id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [score, assign_loss_group]
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [queued, running, succeeded, failed, cancelled]
        submitted_by:
          type: string
        input_file_id:
          type: string
          format: uuid
        results_url:
          type: string
          format: uri
          nullable: true
        error:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

x-webhooks:
  # Webhook examples for consumer implementation (events are POSTed to subscriber URLs)
  criteria.updated:
    post:
      summary: Criteria updated event
      description: |
        Fired when a criteria catalog or version is updated. The request body is the Event schema.
        Webhook requests include X-LGC-Signature header with an HMAC-SHA256 signature:
        X-LGC-Signature: t=unix_ts,v1=hex(hmac_sha256(secret, t + '.' + body))
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/Event'
      responses:

          description: Acknowledge

x-guides:
  # Non-normative developer guidance embedded as comments-like content
  - name: Authentication
    text: |
      - Use OAuth2 client credentials where possible. API keys are supported for server-to-server use.
      - Include Authorization: Bearer <token> on requests.
      - Rotate credentials periodically; tokens are short-lived.
  - name: Idempotency
    text: |
      - For POST endpoints that mutate state, pass Idempotency-Key to safely retry.
      - The server will return the original response for duplicate keys within 24h.
  - name: Rate limiting
    text: |
      - Respect X-RateLimit-* headers. Back off when receiving 429 with Retry-After.
  - name: Webhooks
    text: |
      - Verify X-LGC-Signature using the shared secret (HMAC-SHA256).
      - Respond with 2xx quickly; perform heavy processing asynchronously.
  - name: PII security
    text: |
      - Avoid sending sensitive PII unless required by the criteria.
      - Use file uploads for large documents; never email data.
  - name: Versioning
    text: |
      - This API uses path versioning (/v1). Breaking changes will increment the major version.
